onboarding.title: Don't know much about business? You're in the right place.
onboarding.subtitle: BSPN is a union of 94+ companies that since 1990 explains the rules in plain language, defends businesses in courts and government offices, opens contacts and markets. You're not alone — we'll meet you here.
onboarding.step1Desc: A short application — 2 minutes. No complex jargon.
onboarding.step2Desc: A BSPN expert will call you within 24 hours and find the right format.
onboarding.step3Desc: Get protection, consultations, contacts, and access to events.
onboarding.trust: 94+ companies from 14 industries already trust BSPN

hero.title: No business should fight alone
hero.subtitle: BSPN is a union of 94+ Belarusian companies. We translate laws into plain words, defend you before government bodies, open international markets and help you grow. One click — and you're with your people.

about.pageDescription: The Belarusian Union of Entrepreneurs and Employers named after Prof. M.S. Kunyavsky — the country's leading business association since 1990
about.intro: BSPN brings together 94 organizations from 14 sectors. We represent business interests in 20+ collegial bodies under government agencies, providing legal protection, expert support and international business connections.
about.section1Desc: Social partnership, professionalism and voluntarism — the foundation of our work
about.section2Desc: BSPN's path since 1990 — over 35 years on the side of entrepreneurs
about.section3Desc: Board, Co-Chairs and the union's organizational structure
about.section4Desc: Concrete results: laws changed, rights protected, problems solved
about.section5Desc: 7 associations covering Belarus's key economic sectors

mission.quote: "Promoting entrepreneurship and protecting the lawful rights and interests of businesses is the foundation of Belarus's economic prosperity"
mission.quoteAuthor: — BSPN motto, based on the principles of Prof. M.S. Kunyavsky
mission.p1: BSPN is the largest business association in Belarus, founded in 1990. Our mission is to unite entrepreneurs to protect their interests, foster a healthy business climate and strengthen social partnership.
mission.p2: BSPN acts as an intermediary between business and government, taking part in 20+ collegial bodies under ministries and agencies of the Republic of Belarus. Our voice matters in the discussion of every key bill that affects business.
mission.value1Desc: We build constructive dialogue between business and government. BSPN is a bridge that ensures business interests are accounted for in economic policy.
mission.value2Desc: Our team — economists, lawyers and industry experts with deep experience. We provide qualified expertise on every aspect of running a business in Belarus.
mission.value3Desc: Membership in BSPN is a conscious choice by companies that understand the value of a collective business voice and shared problem-solving.
mission.value4Desc: We openly publish our results, hold regular reporting events and provide members with full access to information about union activities.
mission.symbolDesc: The BSPN symbol is "Veles" — the god of work and prosperity in Slavic mythology — embodying the creative force of entrepreneurship and wisdom in business.

history.pageDescription: From founding in 1990 to becoming Belarus's leading business association
history.memorialDesc: The union bears the name of Professor Mikhail Kunyavsky — an outstanding economist and one of BSPN's founders and first leader. His ideas of social partnership and constructive dialogue between business and the state remain the foundation of the union.
history.1990Desc: BSPN was established as one of the first business associations in the post-Soviet space.
history.1992Desc: First industry associations created, uniting companies by economic sectors.
history.1998Desc: BSPN joined international business organizations and built partnerships with European business associations.
history.2000Desc: The Directors Club was founded — a venue for discussing strategic questions of business development.
history.2005Desc: BSPN established an arbitration court for alternative dispute resolution.
history.2010Desc: The union's anniversary. By this time BSPN was represented in 15+ collegial state bodies.
history.2015Desc: New directions launched: data protection, digital transformation, startup support.
history.2020Desc: Adapting to new conditions: online consultations, remote events and digital member services.
history.2025Desc: Approved the 2026–2028 development strategy with a focus on digital transformation and international cooperation.
history.2026Desc: Launching the new website as a service hub and the strategy to attract new members.

leadership.leader1Desc: Coordinates the union's work with state bodies and international organizations.
leadership.leader2Desc: Oversees expertise, legal support and member relations.
leadership.structure1Desc: The supreme governing body. Held at least once every three years.
leadership.structure2Desc: Collegial executive body. Coordinates day-to-day activity.
leadership.structure3Desc: 7 staff members: economists, lawyers, international relations specialists.

achievements.pageDescription: Concrete BSPN results for Belarusian business
achievements.title: Key wins
achievements.ach1Desc: Initiated and pushed through Tax Code amendments that lowered the tax burden for small and medium business.
achievements.ach2Desc: Thanks to systematic work with the Ministry of Economy, requirements and timelines for business registration were reduced.
achievements.ach3Desc: Drafted and promoted recommendations limiting groundless inspections of businesses.
achievements.ach4Desc: Organized 10+ business missions to EU, CIS and Asian countries, generating 200+ business contacts.
achievements.ach5Desc: Launched the BSPN business ambassadors institute in 15+ countries to support exports and international cooperation.

associations.pageDescription: 7 associations covering Belarus's key economic sectors
associations.industryDesc: Manufacturing companies. Represents interests in industrial policy, pricing and technical regulation.
associations.logisticsDesc: Cargo and passenger carriers, logistics operators. Works with the Ministry of Transport on tariffs and conditions.
associations.constructionDesc: Construction firms, design organizations, building materials manufacturers. Helps shape construction standards.
associations.itDesc: IT companies, software developers and digital service providers. Promotes the IT industry's interests.
associations.tradeDesc: Retailers, networks, service businesses. Protects rights in trade legislation and pricing.
associations.agroDesc: Agricultural and processing enterprises. Works with the Ministry of Agriculture on support and development.
associations.msbDesc: Sole proprietors and smaller companies. Protects SME rights, simplifies regulation and removes barriers.

memberTypes.pageDescription: Pick the format that fits — from getting acquainted to full representation
memberTypes.associatedDesc: For companies that want to get acquainted with BSPN
memberTypes.solidaryDesc: For small businesses and sole proprietors
memberTypes.activeDesc: For mid-size businesses — the full service set
memberTypes.fullDesc: For large businesses and industry leaders
memberTypes.f18: Logo placement on the BSPN site
memberTypes.cond1Desc: Legal entities and sole proprietors registered in the Republic of Belarus that share BSPN's goals.
memberTypes.cond2Desc: Submit the online application → receive a call from BSPN within 24 hours → get Board approval → pay the dues.
memberTypes.cond3Desc: Annual dues depend on membership type and company size. There's no entrance fee.
memberTypes.ctaText: Not sure which type fits? Reach out — we'll help you choose.
